@timestamp.description: Timestamp when the event was detected by Wazuh

GeoLocation.city_name.description: City name derived from IP geolocation

GeoLocation.country_name.description: Country name derived from IP geolocation

GeoLocation.region_name.description: Region name derived from IP geolocation

agent.ip.description: IP address of the Wazuh agent reporting the event

agent.name.description: Hostname of the Wazuh agent reporting the event

data.dstip.description: Destination IP address targeted by the event

data.process.name.description: Name of the process that triggered the event

data.protocol.description: Network protocol used in the event

data.srcip.description: Source IP address where the attack or event originated

decoder.name.description: Name of the Wazuh decoder used to parse the log

full_log.description: Complete raw log entry that triggered the rule

location.description: Log file path or source location that generated the event

manager.name.description: Name of the Wazuh manager that processed the event

rule.description.description: Human readable description of what the rule detected

rule.gdpr.description: GDPR compliance article associated with the rule

rule.groups.description: Categories the rule belongs to e.g. authentication_failed malware

rule.hipaa.description: HIPAA compliance requirement associated with the rule

rule.id.description: Unique identifier of the Wazuh detection rule

rule.level.description: Severity level of the rule from 0 to 15, higher is more severe

rule.nist_800_53.description: NIST 800-53 control associated with the rule

rule.pci_dss.description: PCI DSS compliance requirement associated with the rule

syscheck.audit.process.name.description: Name of the process that triggered the event

syscheck.event.description: FIM event type added modified deleted

syscheck.md5_after.description: MD5 hash of file after modification

syscheck.path.description: File path monitored by Wazuh FIM File Integrity Monitoring

syscheck.sha256_after.description: SHA256 hash of file after modification

syscheck.size_after.description: File size after modification in bytes

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the event was generated at the source
